translated: The blue traffic light was really striking.
Mizuki was born in the summer,
I didn't mean to just say it in passing like this,
Even though they're a summer baby,
I feel like they haven't had many summer-themed illustrations until now.
that their outfits tend to cover up a lot of skin.
I mean, they've had T-shirts and things like that,
But seeing an illustration that feels so refreshing
and screams "summer" the moment you look at it makes me really happy.
